part_a_clock_universality.result: CLOCK UNIVERSALITY DERIVED: all fractal subpatterns share one factor S, so internal ratios are invariant (undetectable from inside) and every mechanism dilates identically — GR's clock universality / equivalence principle FALLS OUT of fractal self-similarity, not posited. Explains Phase-9's clock-universality and why mechanism-dependence is forbidden.

part_b_continuum_no_limit.result: NO sub-c complexity speed limit in the continuum: the contraction (L/γ) and dilation (τ·γ) CANCEL, so the coherence margin is velocity-INDEPENDENT — a pattern coherent at rest stays coherent at any v<c (this IS emergent Lorentz invariance, Phase-5/6). Consistent with heavy ions surviving at 0.9999c. So 'complex can't go fast intact' is NOT a fundamental sub-c effect; the readily-observable complexity↔speed relation is the standard ENERGY cost (E=γmc²), not novel. dp's 'reinforce complexity limit' does NOT hold in the continuum.

part_b_discrete_complexity_enhanced_LIV.result: The one place a complexity limit survives: on the DISCRETE lattice the γ-cancellation fails at O((k·a)²). A pattern's lattice-specific (LIV) group-velocity dispersion grows with boost (carrier k0 → zone edge) AND its dephasing rate ∝ Δk² (k-spread = complexity: more localized/complex patterns span more modes). So coherence-breakdown is COMPLEXITY-ENHANCED at the discreteness order — door #3 collapses into door #2 (LIV), but with a NEW angle: LIV scales with pattern COMPLEXITY (Δk²), not just energy. A complex composite could show the discreteness signature at LOWER per-quantum energy than a simple particle. (pattern/grid)-suppressed but complexity-amplified.

verdict: TREADING dp's RICH GROUND (time dilation on the global-clock substrate). PART A — the GENERATIVE WIN: clock universality is DERIVED from fractal self-similarity (internal ratio deviation 2.2e-16, per-mechanism dilation spread 1.1e-16 — both ~0). All subpatterns share one factor S=S_v·S_g, so the pattern can't detect its own slowdown and EVERY mechanism dilates identically. This is exactly dp's claim, and it EXPLAINS GR's clock universality / the equivalence principle (which GR posits) and constructively resolves Phase-9's tension: mechanism-dependence is forbidden BECAUSE all mechanisms are fractal subpatterns sharing S. A genuine generative result. PART B(continuum) — the HONEST CORRECTION: a sub-c complexity speed limit does NOT emerge — contraction (L/γ) and dilation (τ·γ) cancel, the coherence margin is velocity-independent (v_indep=True), so a pattern coherent at rest survives at any v<c (emergent Lorentz invariance; heavy ions at 0.9999c confirm). dp's 'reinforce complexity limit' does NOT hold in the continuum; the observable complexity↔speed relation is the standard energy cost E=γmc². PART B(discrete) — the NEW BET: the cancellation fails at O((k·a)²) on the lattice, and the LIV dephasing rate ∝ Δk² (complexity) and grows toward the zone edge (boost). So door #3 folds into door #2 (LIV) but adds a genuinely new angle — LIV is COMPLEXITY-ENHANCED (∝ k-spread²), so a complex composite could show the discreteness signature at LOWER per-quantum energy than a simple particle. That is a candidate door-#3 prediction (still (pattern/grid)-suppressed, not yet a quantified falsifier). NET: one generative win (clock universality derived), one honest null (no continuum complexity limit — corrects the intuition), one new candidate bet (complexity-enhanced LIV). Bucket 0 = 0.
